property.name: gateway.port
property.description: The port that the gateway will listen on for requests.

property.name: gateway.path
property.description: The context path that will precede the topology name in requests.

property.name: gateway.deployment.dir.polling.interval
property.description: The polling interval in seconds for topology changes.

property.name: ssl.enabled
property.description: Indicates if SSL/TLS is enabled for the gateway endpoint.

property.name: ssl.exclude.protocols
property.description: A comma-separated list of SSL/TLS protocols to exclude.

property.name: gateway.bind.address
property.description: The IP address that the gateway binds to. Use 0.0.0.0 for all interfaces.

property.name: gateway.httpclient.connectionTimeout
property.description: The connection timeout for Knox HTTP connections to backend Hadoop services.

property.name: gateway.httpclient.socketTimeout
property.description: The socket timeout for Knox HTTP traffic to backend Hadoop services.

property.name: gateway.xforwarded.enabled
property.description: Propagate X-Forwarded-* headers to backend services.
